label: Collective intelligence
description: Mechanisms where groups, swarms, markets, or institutions convert local states into coordinated later action.
state_words: retained trace, memory, record, or environmental mark
rule, memory, record, precedent, or shared belief
input_words: signal, task cue, reward, or local interaction
boundary_words: network, platform, arena, institution, or task boundary
institution, platform, network, or governance boundary
output_words: route choice, consensus, allocation, cascade, or group response
decision, allocation, consensus, sanction, or collective action
validation_words: same final state with different history
same final trace with shuffled history
